reactions.name: Storm Surge
reactions.description: Wind meets water in a devastating electrical storm

reactions.name: Mud Snare
reactions.description: Water saturates earth, trapping enemies in thick mud

reactions.name: Dust Cyclone
reactions.description: Wind whips earth into a blinding storm of debris

reactions.name: Black Steam
reactions.description: Dark energy corrupts water into scalding toxic vapor

reactions.name: Gravebind
reactions.description: Dark power infuses the earth, binding enemies to their grave

reactions.name: Hellstorm
reactions.description: Wind fans dark flames into an infernal tempest
